[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your hand.

[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {CalculatedHits:diff()} times.

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {hits:diff()} times to ALL enemies.

STS2_MULUNDUS-CURSORS_LOG.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, put a random card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] that costs the same as the exhausted card on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

STS2_MULUNDUS-DREAD_ARMAMENT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].

STS2_MULUNDUS-CHANNEL.title: Channel

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Powers[/gold] in your hand cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less this turn.

STS2_MULUNDUS-MELD_INTO_STONE.descriptio:
Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].

STS2_MULUNDUS-SURVIVAL_OF_THE_FITTEST.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

STS2_MULUNDUS-POISONED_BARBS.title: Poisoned Barbs
STS2_MULUNDUS-EXACT_VENGEANCE.descriptio:

STS2_MULUNDUS-HUNTERS_MARK.description:
